economic_notes: Investments in Pimee Well Servicing Ltd (17%), Pimee Limited Partnership (16.67%), Seven Lakes Oilfield Services LP (8.33%), Athabasca Indigenous Investments LP (4.9995%), Black Diamond Nehiyawak Partnership (50.005%), SLS Metalworks & Fabricating LP (8.33%). Significant infrastructure construction underway ($7.89M assets under construction).
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to asset retirement obligations not being estimated or recorded (PS 3280 adopted April 1, 2022). New accounting standards adopted in 2023 (PS 1201, PS 3450, PS 3041, PS 3280). Prior year restated for tangible capital assets purchased with third-party funding not previously recorded. Consolidated entities include: Beaver Lake Education Authority - Amisk Community School, Beaver Lake Wah-Pow Treatment Centre, Beaver Lake Health Centre, Beaver Lake Government and Industry Relations. Trust funds held by Ottawa ($1,242,387) and other trust funds ($5,102,392) recorded as financial assets. Remeasurement gains of $298,155 recognized on adoption of PS 3450 for other trust funds measured at fair value. Segmented information note was cut off in source document. ISC funding calculated as ISC base ($19,285,069) only; total government transfers includes ISC base + ISC Health Canada + CMHC + HRDC + First Nation Development Funds.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
